# Board reference: STM32G474RE board ENTO_RESULT outputs.
# Scope: FPU differential tests only (single-op, Level A repeat, Level B seq,
#        preamble zeroing, hand-written vldm/vstm/vpush/vpop variants).
#        TinyMPC + matvec variants are excluded — they depend on the known
#        multi-d-reg vldmia bug and aren't useful signal until it's fixed.
# Diffed against gem5 output by verification/diff_gem5_vs_board.sh.
# Refresh deliberately after a verified board sweep by:
#   grep -vE '(tinympc|matvec)' verification/logs/board/ento_results.txt \
#     > verification/board_reference.txt.new
#   # prepend this header, then replace the old file and commit.
# source git sha: 18bcebc
# captured:       2026-04-24T18:58:24Z (committed at repo state 977dab1)
#
